runners.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a strong early split and tried to lead throughout but had to settle for the minors when second (22.89) at this track over 388m. Has ability and can run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and checked through the 1st turn.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at The Gardens (23.45) in a NG, finishing a 9 length sixth. Has two successes and five minors from 13 starts from box 2. Others appear better placed.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at The Gardens (23.45) in a NG, finishing a 9 length sixth. Has two successes and five minors from 13 starts from box 2. Others appear better placed.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (22.54) in a NG, finishing a 3.5 lengths fourth. Has never missed the frame from three starts from the draw, including a win. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (22.54) in a NG, finishing a 3.5 lengths fourth. Has never missed the frame from three starts from the draw, including a win. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

runners.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (22.96) over 400m at The Gardens. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (22.96) over 400m at The Gardens. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

runners.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording four minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (29.95) over 515m at this track. The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Recorded a 2.25 lengths win (15.74) in a Grade 3/4 last time at The Gardens. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Looks well placed and should feature.
